title: heuchera ovalifolia var. typica
intro: Heuchera ovalifolia var. typica, also known as Alumroot, is a plant species that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heuchera ovalifolia var. typica include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made from its roots and leaves.
